ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., Equity, Mutual Fund) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the financial instrument is listed */,
  "market_open" TEXT /* Market opening time for the financial instrument */,
  "market_close" TEXT /* Market closing time for the financial instrument */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the market where the financial instrument is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "match_score" REAL /* Match score for search relevance */,
  "isin_code" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the instrument */,
  "sedol_code" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List code for the instrument */,
  "cusip_code" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures code for the instrument */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the instrument's data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* Market opening time in the region */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* Market closing time in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, trade, search) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the financial instrument */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time of the opening price */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time of the closing price */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the instrument */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
